title: Back To Work
summary:
Main
By Ulf Bergman
The week-long holiday for the Chinese Lunar New Year is over and the world's second largest economy is getting back to work. As widely expected, travel during the period was a far cry from the levels usually seen. The Ministry of Transport reported a 73 percent decline of daily trips compared to 2019, the last normal year.
